calendar.matters:
Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER UBS FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
